patches.note:
Repo hygiene: move root report files into .cache/reports and keep them ignored.
- move sim_report.json -> .cache/reports/sim_report.json
- move sim_report_both.json -> .cache/reports/sim_report_both.json
- move sim_report_evidence.json -> .cache/reports/sim_report_evidence.json

rationale: Repo hygiene suggests moving generated root reports into .cache/ to reduce clutter.
